# K.M.F. Trading Journal

> K.M.F. Trading Journal is a free trading journal app for Android that helps forex, futures, crypto and prop-firm traders log trades, track statistics (win rate, profit factor, R-multiple, expectancy), enforce risk rules, and improve discipline. This site (kmfjournal.com) is the product's landing page plus an educational blog and a set of free trading calculators. There is no web app and no login — the journal itself runs on Android.

## Key facts
- Product: K.M.F. Trading Journal — Android trading journal app (free to start).
- What it does: trade logging, performance analytics, risk management, trading psychology tools, prop-firm drawdown tracking.
- Audience: retail forex/futures/crypto traders and prop-firm (funded) traders.
- Languages: site content is available in English (default), Romanian (`/ro/`) and German (`/de/`).
- The website uses no tracking, no accounts and no Firebase; Firebase is used only inside the Android app (described in the Privacy Policy).

## Main pages
- [Home](https://kmfjournal.com/): product overview, features, pricing and download.
- [About](https://kmfjournal.com/about): what K.M.F. Trading Journal is and who it is for.
- [Blog index](https://kmfjournal.com/blog): all educational articles on trading discipline, risk and statistics.
- [Privacy Policy](https://kmfjournal.com/privacy-policy)
- [Terms of Service](https://kmfjournal.com/terms-of-service)

## Free trading tools (calculators)
- [Lot Size Calculator](https://kmfjournal.com/tools/lot-size-calculator): position size from account risk %, stop distance and pair.
- [Risk of Ruin Calculator](https://kmfjournal.com/tools/risk-of-ruin): probability of blowing an account given win rate and risk.
- [Win Rate / R:R Matrix](https://kmfjournal.com/tools/win-rate-rr-matrix): which win-rate and reward-to-risk combos are profitable.
- [Compound Calculator](https://kmfjournal.com/tools/compound-calculator): account growth projection over time.
- [Pre-Trade Checklist](https://kmfjournal.com/tools/pre-trade-checklist): interactive checklist before entering a trade.
- [Trader Personality Test](https://kmfjournal.com/tools/trader-personality-test): 16-question test that sorts you into one of nine trader archetypes (Sniper, Stoic, Comeback Kid, Revenge Trader, Gambler, Overtrader, Overthinker, True Believer, Momentum Rider) with your behavioral bias and three fixes.
